name: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements
description: The product receives input from an upstream component but does not neutralize special elements that could be interpreted as control elements or syntactic markers when sent to a downstream component, enabling various injection attacks.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data containing special elements (delimiters, escape chars, null bytes, wildcards, quotes, metacharacters) that flows to EGRESS or EXTERNAL[downstream] without a TRANSFORM[neutralization] node that encodes, escapes, or strips the special elements appropriate to the downstream context
